title: diplotropis racemosa
intro: Diplotropis racemosa, also known as the Philippine tree or balatbat, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Diplotropis racemosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Diplotropis racemosa is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines.
